## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added i18n keys to **both** `src/i18n/locales/en.json` and `src/i18n/locales/fr.json` for any new user-facing strings
- [ ] I have not hardcoded any French or English strings in components
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style of the project
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if necessary

Add screenshots to help explain your changes.
